name: Stinger Resources Inc.
summary: Stinger Resources Inc. engages in developing precious metal properties in Canada. Its flagship property is Dunwell Property, a gold-silver property located in the Skeena Mining Division in northwestern British Columbia. The company holds 6 prospective precious metals properties in the province of British Columbia, Canada. Stinger Resources Inc. was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Cardston, Canada.
